title: DefiningFunction
summary: Formalizes boundary defining functions, geodesic defining functions, and their normalization conditions.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Formalizes boundary defining functions, geodesic defining functions, and their normalization conditions.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/PE/DefiningFunction.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A boundary defining function for a conformally compact bulk. Its mathematical data are: r: Function Symbol X.bulk; positive interior: for every x : X.bulk, x belongs to X.interior maps to 0 < r x; zero on boundary: for every x : X.boundary, r X.boundary Inclusion x equals 0; nondegenerate boundary: Prop.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}r&\colon \operatorname{FunctionSymbol} X.\operatorname{bulk}\\\operatorname{positive\_interior}&\colon \forall x \colon X.\operatorname{bulk}, x \in X.\operatorname{interior} \longrightarrow 0 < r x\\\operatorname{zero\_on\_boundary}&\colon \forall x \colon X.\operatorname{boundary}, r (X.\operatorname{boundaryInclusion} x) = 0\\\operatorname{nondegenerate\_boundary}&\colon \mathrm{Prop}\end{aligned}

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The compactified metric r^2 gPlus. In explicit terms, for x of type pespace, gplus of type metric symbol x.bulk, and r of type defining function x, its defining expression is Metric Symbol.scale By Function the function sending x to r.r x to the power 2 g Plus.
correspondence.leanType: def compactifiedMetric {X : PESpace} (gPlus : MetricSymbol X.bulk) (r : DefiningFunction X) : MetricSymbol X.bulk

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A geodesic defining function. normSqGradientCompactified represents |dr|^2_(r^2 gPlus). Its interpretation will be supplied by a concrete Riemannian backend. Its mathematical data are: norm Sq Gradient Compactified: Function Symbol X.bulk; gradient certificate: Prop; geodesic condition: for every x : X.bulk, x belongs to X.interior maps to norm Sq Gradient Compactified x equals 1.
correspondence.leanType: structure GeodesicDefiningFunction (X : PESpace.{u, v}) (gPlus : MetricSymbol X.bulk) extends DefiningFunction X

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For r of type Geodesic Defining Function X g Plus, compactified Metric g Plus r.to Defining Function equals Metric Symbol.scale By Function the function sending x to r.r x to the power 2 g Plus.
correspondence.leanType: theorem compactification (r : GeodesicDefiningFunction X gPlus) : compactifiedMetric gPlus r.toDefiningFunction = MetricSymbol.scaleByFunction (fun x => (r.r x) ^ 2) gPlus

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For r of type Geodesic Defining Function X g Plus, x of type X.bulk, and hx of type x belongs to X.interior, r.norm Sq Gradient Compactified x equals 1.
correspondence.leanType: theorem normSqGradient_eq_one (r : GeodesicDefiningFunction X gPlus) {x : X.bulk} (hx : x ∈ X.interior) : r.normSqGradientCompactified x = 1

references.note: Source for Poincaré normal form and its relation to straight ambient metrics.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
